utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 headings. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided (June 20-24, 2024) – specific dates given – fully specified. 3) transportation: has type, route, party details, and a single cost (€400) – but lacks specific flight details (airline, flight numbers, times); however, the format only requires flight details with costs. Given “Flights (Budget Airline, Economy Class)” and round-trip Paris-Prague with cost €400 is minimally acceptable, though sparse – accept as included. 4) accommodation: name given (Tranquil Inn), nights “5 nights” aligns with trip length, and cost €500 – fully specified as a selection with costs, though missing address/room type is not required by format. 5) activities: The format requires selected activities with costs. The package lists example activities but does not give itemized costs per activity, only an overall estimate (€800) for dining and activities. This does not meet “selected activities with costs” as individual activities don’t have costs – not fully specified. 6) additional_services: “N/A” – acceptable as an explicit entry. 7) total_budget: Provided with a breakdown (Flights €400, Accommodation €500, Remaining €800) – fully specified. Therefore, 6 of 7 are included and fully specified, with the activities item failing due to lack of specific costs per activity.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is Prague, Czech Republic. Transportation is Flights (Budget Airline, Economy Class). Accommodation is Tranquil Inn.
